summary: CP7 core execution flow passed locally: runs start, steps progress in order, pause/resume works, posts persist with masked PII, SSE history replays, and checkpoints are stored. The remaining gap is real-account crawl validation because this machine is configured in browser mock mode.

checks.name: CHECK-02: Step execution order
checks.expected: At least 1 DONE step and ordered progression
checks.actual: step-1 DONE, step-2 RUNNING, then both DONE

checks.name: CHECK-03: Pause
checks.actual: status=PAUSED while current crawl step completed before waiting

checks.name: CHECK-04: Resume
checks.actual: status=RUNNING and run later finished DONE

checks.name: CHECK-05: Real Facebook crawl
checks.expected: Real group crawl through a logged-in Facebook account
checks.actual: 12 posts crawled through deterministic browser mock session fixture because browser_mock_mode=true

checks.name: CHECK-06: PII masking
checks.command: sqlite3 backend/app.db "SELECT content FROM crawled_posts WHERE run_id='run-b1494ee46d' LIMIT 5;"
checks.expected: No raw phone/email in stored content
checks.actual: Stored posts show masked tokens like [PHONE] and no raw email values

checks.name: CHECK-07: SSE events
checks.expected: event/data lines including step_started, step_done, run_done
checks.actual: Backlog stream replay returned run_started, step_started, step_done, run_paused, run_resumed, and later run_done events

checks.name: CHECK-08: Checkpoint persistence
checks.command: sqlite3 backend/app.db "SELECT step_run_id, checkpoint IS NOT NULL ..."
checks.actual: Both DONE step_runs for run-b1494ee46d have checkpoint=1

checks.name: CHECK-09: MonitorPage UI
checks.expected: SSE connection and step status rendering
checks.actual: MonitorPage uses EventSource, renders stream events, and shows step status cards
